name: HNS_INVESTIGATIONS_SUMMARY_
description: HNS INVESTIGATIONS SUMMARY. This table stores all investigation related data.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Investigation Identifier. Primary key for HNS_INVESTIGATIONS_SUMMARY table.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_NO
columns.Comments: Unique user generated Investigation  Identifier.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_DATE
columns.Comments: The date the investigation was initiated by the investigation owner.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Incident Identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_SUMMARY table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Incidents Event identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: The user entered summary on the investigation.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of investigation. This signifies the level of investigation. Low level, high level.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: The employee ID of ther person who owns the investigation. The investigation owner will always be an employee.

columns.Name: INVEST_OWNER_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: The Assignment ID of ther person who owns the investigation. The investigation owner will always be an employee.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted Flag.Signifies whether investigation is deleted.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Completed Flag. Signifies whether Investigation is completed

columns.Name: INVEST_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: INVEST_STATUS_CODE column: Current InVESTIGATION  Status. Lookup to FND_LOOKUP STATUS.

columns.Name: TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Target Completion date for an investigation.

columns.Name: ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual completion date for an investigation

columns.Name: LESSONS_LEARNED
columns.Comments: Lessons Learned.

columns.Name: INVESTIGATE_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description entered by the user for the investigation.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: INVEST_REVIEWER_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to investigation reviewer.

columns.Name: INVEST_APPROVER_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to investigation approver.

columns.Name: INVEST_PRECOM_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to investigation precom approver.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: To store the Questionnaire referenced by the Investigation.

columns.Name: FINDING_COMMENT
columns.Comments: User entered finding comments.

columns.Name: FINDING_FINAL_RESPONSE
columns.Comments: User entered finding final response.

columns.Name: CASUAL_FACTORS_CODE
columns.Comments: Code Lookup from FND_LOOKUP, ORA_HNS_CAUSAL_FACTORS.

columns.Name: CONTRIBUTING_FACTORS_CODE
columns.Comments: Code Lookup from FND_LOOKUP, ORA_HNS_CONTRIBUTING_FACTORS.

columns.Name: UNDERLYING_FACTORS_CODE
columns.Comments: Code Lookup from FND_LOOKUP,ORA_HNS_UNDERLYING_FACTORS.

columns.Name: IMMEDIATE_CAUSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code Lookup from FND_LOOKUP,ORA_HNS_IMMEDIATE_CAUSE.

columns.Name: ROOT_CAUSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code Lookup from FND_LOOKUP,ORA_HNS_ROOT_CAUSE.
